warm_up:
Push Press Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Scap Pull Up
10 Plate I Y T
10 Plate Shoulder Press
10 Squat Jump
15 Calf Raise
If catching up, talk to the coach for a warm up relevant to your movement

strength.name: Clean and Jerk
strength.description:
1x1 | Clean does not need to hit depth. This does not mean Power Clean as high as you can. Still get low! | BUILD 6 Sets E3MOM
00:00 5 @ 50%
03:00 5 @ 60%
06:00 3 @ 70%
09:00 2 @ 80%
12:00 1 @ 90%
15:00 1 @ 95%
18:00-28:00 1RM Attempts

metcon.name: Jackie
metcon.description:
For time:
1,000-meter row
50 thrusters
30 pull-ups

Men: 45 lb.
Women: 35 lb.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Clean/Jerk and Jackie exhaust pressing and leg drive; posterior chain work aids recovery without competing for resources.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Clean and Jerk, 1 by 1 at 95 percent. Metcon: Jackie. For Time: 1,000-meter row, 50 thrusters, 30 pull-ups. For hypertrophy, focus on back (rows/pulls), hamstrings, glutes.
